<script setup lang="ts">
const profileOpen = ref(false);
function toggleProfile() {
  profileOpen.value = !profileOpen.value;
}
</script>

<script setup lang="ts">
const visibleInvoiceItems = computed(() => {
  return invoiceItems.value.filter((item) => item.visible);
});
</script>

<script setup lang="ts">
watch(() => route.params.walletId, async (id) => {
  if (!id) return;
  currentWallet.value = await loadWallet(String(id));
});
</script>

<template>
  <Transition name="message-fade">
    <aside v-if="messageOpen" class="drawer">{{ message.summary }}</aside>
  </Transition>
</template>
